# Stonebridge Bagels & Deli

> Family-owned New York-style bagel shop in Allentown, NJ — handcrafted boiled bagels baked fresh daily since 2013.

## About

Stonebridge Bagels & Deli is a family-owned bakery and deli located at 1278 Yardville-Allentown Road, Allentown, NJ 08501. We specialize in authentic New York-style boiled bagels, house-made cream cheese spreads, breakfast and lunch sandwiches, salads, homemade cookies, and our signature Chorizo Bagel.

## Hours

- Monday–Friday: 5:30 AM – 3:00 PM
- Saturday–Sunday: 6:00 AM – 2:00 PM

## Contact

- Phone: (609) 738-3222
- Email: steven@stonebridgebagels.com
- Website: https://www.stonebridgebagels.com

## Location

1278 Yardville-Allentown Road, Allentown, NJ 08501

## Menu Categories

- **Bagels**: Plain, Everything, Sesame, Poppy, Cinnamon Raisin, and more — all hand-rolled and boiled daily
- **Spreads**: Plain Cream Cheese, Scallion, Veggie, Lox Spread, Butter, and seasonal varieties
- **Breakfast Sandwiches**: Egg, cheese, and meat combos on fresh bagels
- **Lunch Sandwiches & Wraps**: Deli meats, specialty sandwiches
- **Salads**: Fresh made-to-order salads
- **Catering**: Bagel platters, sandwich trays, and custom catering for events

## Ordering

- **Pickup Orders**: Order online at https://www.stonebridgebagels.com/order for in-store pickup
- **Buy by the Dozen**: Wholesale and bulk ordering available at https://www.stonebridgebagels.com/wholesale
- **Catering**: Contact us for catering inquiries

## What Makes Us Special

- Authentic New York-style bagels: hand-rolled, boiled, then baked
- Fresh daily — no preservatives
- Family-owned and community-focused since 2013
- Signature Chorizo Bagel — a one-of-a-kind creation
- House-made cream cheeses and spreads
